overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player character walks along sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes under overpasses in a futuristic cyberpunk downtown area featuring towering skyscrapers, neon advertisements, flying vehicles, and scattered pedestrians.

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past outdoor cafe seating with white umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person in teal jacket and white hat walking in the same direction

entered.detail: row of white umbrellas and outdoor tables with checkered barriers
large neon corporate signage on tall glass building
elevated pedestrian bridge spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny sidewalk in a futuristic city, with outdoor cafe seating on the left and towering skyscrapers ahead. The camera moves forward past pedestrians and outdoor dining areas, approaching a crosswalk with the Orbital Air building visible in the distance.

events.description: entering shaded area under the overpass as the lighting shifts from bright sun to shadow

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk alongside other pedestrians moving in the same direction

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in colorful clothing crossing the street together

entered.detail: concrete building with dark entrance and red signage
piles of white and blue trash bags accumulated on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the intersection with a crowd of pedestrians, transitioning from bright sunlight into the shadow of an overpass. The Ellison building becomes visible on the left as the scene enters a more enclosed urban space with accumulated trash bags on the sidewalk.

agents.ego_description: walking under the shaded overpass past concrete pillars and street vendors

entered.detail: futuristic vending kiosks with glowing screens and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking through the dimly lit area beneath the overpass, surrounded by concrete architecture and neon signage. The Ellison building remains on the left while vending machines appear ahead on the right, and the sidewalk is lined with trash bags and temporary barriers.

events.description: exiting the shaded overpass into bright sunlight causing a sudden illumination change
flying vehicle passes overhead moving from right to left

agents.ego_description: turning the corner and continuing along the sidewalk while passing vending machines

notable_agents.action: flying car hovering above the street moving across the frame

entered.detail: tall digital advertisement boards displaying product commercials
futuristic hovering car with blue and red coloring

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the shadows into bright sunlight at a street corner, revealing futuristic vending machines and advertising kiosks. A flying vehicle passes overhead as the scene opens up to show more of the towering cyberpunk cityscape with the Orbital Air sign visible again in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with mixed traditional and futuristic architecture

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various storefronts and pedestrians

entered.detail: building with traditional Japanese architectural elements mixed with neon cyberpunk aesthetics
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a walk along a sunlit street featuring a mix of traditional Japanese-inspired architecture and futuristic elements on the left, with palm trees on the right. The camera moves steadily forward through the cyberpunk cityscape, passing various pedestrians and storefronts as the urban environment continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic downtown district, transitioning from bright open sidewalks into the oppressive shadows of an overpass before emerging back into the sunlight. It begins by moving past outdoor cafe seating and pedestrians toward the distant Orbital Air building under a clear sky. As the camera crosses a busy intersection, the bright light fades into the dimness of an urban underpass, where the scene shifts to a more enclosed space characterized by concrete architecture, neon signs, and piles of trash bags. The camera then emerges from these shadows back into the glare of the sun at a street corner, passing futuristic vending machines as a flying vehicle glides overhead. Finally, the path opens up to a sunlit street blending Japanese-inspired architecture with palm trees and towering skyscrapers as the camera continues its steady forward progression.
